account.title: Account
account.disconnectDescription: You will no longer be able to sign in with this {{provider}} account.
account.cannotDisconnect: Set a password first before disconnecting your only login method.
account.linkError: This account is already linked to another user.

profile.title: Profile
profile.verifyHint: Your email is not verified. Please check your inbox for the verification link.

password.label: Password
password.oauthNote: You signed up with {{provider}}. Set a password to enable email login.
password.oauthSetHint: Setting a password lets you sign in with email too.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Use your device's biometrics or security key to sign in without a password.
passkeys.deleteDescription: You will no longer be able to sign in with this passkey.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app.
mfa.scanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
mfa.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
mfa.recoveryCodesDescription: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
mfa.disableDescription: Enter a 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or a recovery code, to confirm.

danger.title: Danger zone
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
danger.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete your account and all your data. This action cannot be undone.
danger.deleteFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language. This setting is saved locally.
